content.speakerText: Alright, I’ve got a meeting in five—gotta run!
content.speakerTextCn: 好了，我五分钟后开会，得走了！

options.text: See you later! Don't work too hard.
Go crush it! Text me after—let’s lock in dinner plans!
Okay, bye. I’ll call you tomorrow.
That’s fine. I’ll just wait here.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Go crush it! Text me after—let’s lock in dinner plans!' 使用了鼓励性表达 'crush it' 和互动性提议 'Text me'，符合场景中强化积极情绪和保持联系的要求。选项1虽礼貌但缺乏情感互动；选项3虽合理但不够热情；选项4完全不合语境，显得被动冷漠。

content.speakerText: You’re the real MVP—don’t forget to take a breath sometimes!
content.speakerTextCn: 你真是真·MVP，记得偶尔喘口气啊！

options.text: Thanks, I guess I’m just stressed.
Haha, I’ll try—thanks for having my back!
Yeah, I know. See you next week.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Haha, I’ll try—thanks for having my back!' 既回应了赞美，又用短语 'having my back' 表达了感激与亲密感，符合情感强化要求。选项1消极且未回应支持；选项3平淡无情感；选项4否认赞美，破坏对话氛围。

content.speakerText: I’m heading out—thanks for everything this week!
content.speakerTextCn: 我要走了，感谢你这周的所有帮助！

options.text: You’re so welcome! You’ve been amazing—let’s grab coffee soon!

content.explanation: 正确答案 'You’re so welcome! You’ve been amazing—let’s grab coffee soon!' 不仅表达了感谢，还用积极评价 'amazing' 和未来邀约 'grab coffee' 强化了情感联结。选项1虽礼貌但平淡；选项3过于简短缺乏温度；选项4贬低自己，削弱了积极氛围。

content.template: Go ___ it! Text me after—let’s lock in dinner plans!
content.hint: 用于鼓励他人全力以赴的地道表达
content.knowledgePoint: 固定搭配（crush it = 大获成功）

content.template: Thanks for ___ my back—I really appreciate it!
content.hint: 表达‘支持我’的常用短语，强调情感支持
content.knowledgePoint: 惯用搭配（have my back = 支持、站在某人这边）

content.template: You’ve been such a ___—let’s catch up soon!
content.hint: 口语中称赞他人很棒的非正式表达，类似 MVP
content.knowledgePoint: 非正式赞美表达（you're a rock = 你太棒了）

content.speakerText: Alright, I’ve got a meeting in five—gotta run!
content.speakerTextCn: 好了，我五分钟后开会，得走了！
expectedAnswers: Go crush it! Text me after—we’ll plan dinner!
You’ve got this! Let me know how it goes!
Bye! Hope your meeting goes amazing!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了告别并传递鼓励或期待后续联系
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者的口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了如 'crush it', 'text me', 'plan' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: You’re the real MVP—don’t forget to take a breath sometimes!
content.speakerTextCn: 你真是真·MVP，记得偶尔喘口气啊！
expectedAnswers: Haha, I’ll try—thanks for having my back!
Thanks! I’m learning to slow down—appreciate you reminding me!
MVP? I’m just lucky. Talk tomorrow?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了赞美并表达感激或谦逊
语言准确性：是否正确使用了 'have my back', 'take a breath' 等表达
表达自然度：语气是否真诚、符合亲密对话风格
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'MVP', 'have my back', 'talk tomorrow' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I’m off to the airport—thanks for all your help this month!
content.speakerTextCn: 我要去机场了——感谢你这个月的所有帮助！
expectedAnswers: You’re so welcome! You’ve been incredible—text me when you land!
Anytime! Safe travels—and let’s plan a reunion soon!
I’m glad I could help! Have an amazing trip and don’t forget to relax!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达感谢并传递温暖、期待后续联系
语言准确性：语法和词汇是否自然地道
表达自然度：是否体现真诚、积极的告别氛围
关键词覆盖：是否使用了如 'you’re welcome', 'safe travels', 'text me', 'plan' 等告别收尾关键词
